description.p: Musa CAD is a fast, modern 2D CAD application. It mirrors AutoCAD's UI layout, command line, and classic shortcuts, on a multi-threaded, GPU-accelerated, data-oriented core targeting a smooth 144 Hz+ viewport.

ul.li: 2D drafting: lines, polylines, circles, arcs, rectangles, hatches
Full Modify suite: move, copy, rotate, mirror, scale, offset, trim, fillet, array
Dimensions, leaders, and text (TrueType and stroke fonts)
Blocks, layers, linetypes, and a Properties palette with MATCHPROP
Dynamic input on the canvas and multi-document tabs
DXF read/write built in; DWG via an external converter
PDF / print plotting with true vector output

screenshot.caption: The Musa CAD interface: ribbon, multi-document tabs, and the Properties palette
A dense architectural drawing with elevations and a floor plan
A dimensioned mechanical detail with a bolt-circle and section view
The Hatch Editor over a sectioned detail and title block

description.p: First public release. Capable but early: 2D drafting, modify, dimensions, text, blocks, hatches, layers, DXF I/O, and vector PDF plotting.
